arn.description: Amazon Resource Name for IAM policies and API calls referencing the route table

default_association_route_table.description: Indicates if this is the default route table for transit gateway associations

default_propagation_route_table.description: Shows if this route table is the default for transit gateway propagations

id.description: Unique identifier for the transit gateway route table configuration

tags_all.description: Complete set of tags assigned to the transit gateway route table
